name: devx-mux-monorepo
description: Multiplex independent AI implementation and review workflows.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/terminal-ui packages/reviewer apps/cli && npm run build:skill-scripts
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:skills && npm run test:install
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/terminal-ui packages/reviewer apps/cli && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
